🌿 Today's Tip
🌾 Paddy: Watch for blast disease — spray Tricyclazole at booting stage   |   🍌 Banana (Poovan): Apply potassium-rich fertilizer before flowering   |   🥜 Groundnut: Apply gypsum at pegging stage for better pod fill   |   🍅 Tomato: Watch for early blight — spray Mancozeb 2.5g/L preventively   |   🫘 Cotton: Monitor for bollworm at boll formation stage   |   🌿 Turmeric: Ridge beds before sowing — avoid waterlogging

🚨
Red Alert — Heavy rain Tue & Wed
Coimbatore, Erode, Tiruppur districts. Avoid pesticide spraying. Drain low-lying paddy fields. Secure young banana plants and sugarcane.
⚠️
Bud rot risk — high humidity alert
84% humidity creates conditions for Phytophthora bud rot in coconut. Apply Bordeaux mixture 1% to crown of palms this week before rain intensifies.
✅
Good window for paddy transplanting
Monday is ideal for transplanting Kuruvai paddy seedlings in Cauvery delta. Soil temperature (28°C) and moisture are in optimal range.
🌱
Rubber tapping — pause advised
Continuous rain reduces latex quality and increases bark damage risk. Resume tapping on Thursday when dry spell is expected.

Government Schemes

Schemes you qualify for

Central and Tamil Nadu state schemes matched to your crops and landholding. Updated regularly.

PM-KISAN — Income Support
Open
Direct income support of ₹6,000/year to farmer families with cultivable land. Paid in 3 equal installments of ₹2,000 directly to bank account via DBT.
💰 ₹6,000 / year
Eligible: All land-owning farmers. Enroll at nearest Agriculture Office.
TN Chief Minister's Farmers Relief Fund
Open
Immediate financial assistance to farmers affected by natural calamities including drought, flood, cyclone, and crop loss. Covers both food crops and horticultural crops.
💰 ₹13,500 per hectare (food crops)
Eligible: All TN farmers with crop loss above 33%. Apply via Village Administrative Officer.
PMFBY — Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
Open
Crop insurance for paddy, sugarcane, banana, groundnut covering losses from drought, flood, cyclone, and pest attacks. Premium subsidized to 2% for kharif crops, 1.5% for rabi.
🛡️ Premium from ₹280/acre
Eligible: All crop farmers. Apply before sowing deadline.
TN Micro Irrigation Scheme (TANHODA)
Open
50–100% subsidy on drip and sprinkler irrigation systems for banana, sugarcane, vegetables, and horticultural crops. SC/ST farmers and women farmers get 100% subsidy.
💰 Up to 100% subsidy
Eligible: All TN farmers. SC/ST and women farmers — full subsidy.
TN Banana Development Scheme
Deadline: Aug 31
Subsidy for banana cultivation — planting material (tissue culture), drip irrigation, and fertilizer costs. Covers Grand Naine, Poovan, and Nendran varieties in Cauvery belt and hill districts.
💰 ₹28,000 per hectare
Eligible: Banana farmers. Apply via Block Agriculture Office.
Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
Open
Short-term crop loans at 4% interest rate (7% with 3% subvention). Credit limit up to ₹3 lakh without collateral. Covers cultivation, post-harvest and allied activities.
💳 Up to ₹3 lakh at 4% interest
Eligible: All farmers. Apply at any nationalized bank.

Farm Records

Farm diary

Log activities, treatments, expenses, and observations. Keep a digital record of your farm.

Add a new entry
Recent entries
June 10, 2025Fertilization
🌾 Paddy
Applied basal dose NPK 40:20:20 kg/ha for Kuruvai paddy. Used urea 87 kg + SSP 125 kg + MOP 33 kg per hectare. 3 acres treated. Top dressing due at 30 DAT.
June 7, 2025Pest treatment
🍌 Banana
Noticed thrips damage on flower buds of Grand Naine batch. Sprayed Fipronil 5 SC at 2ml/L. Total 60 litres spray used. Will monitor for 7 days.
June 3, 2025Irrigation
🎋 Sugarcane
Drip irrigation running well. Set timer to 4 hours morning for ratoon crop. Fertigation with 19:19:19 at 2.5 kg per acre via drip. Next fertigation in 10 days.
🌿

⚙️ API key settings
⚙️ API Key Settings
Weather runs through a hidden server key by default (once deployed). Add your own free key here if you're not deployed, or want to guarantee it's never rate-limited by other users.
Free at openweathermap.org/api — sign up, copy your key from the "API keys" tab. New keys can take up to ~2 hours to activate.
Market prices already work with a shared public sample key, so this is only needed if that shared key ever gets rate-limited. Free at data.gov.in — register, then find your key under "My Account → API Keys".
